proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines in the top quartile of growth_rate_doublings_per_day (>= 0.964) have more negative dependency_POLR2A scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines in the top quartile of growth_rate_doublings_per_day (>= 0.964) have more negative dependency_DHX9 scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines in the top quartile of growth_rate_doublings_per_day (>= 0.964) have more negative dependency_TMED10 scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_POLR2A in growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= q75 vs all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: High-growth POLR2A dependency contrast: subgroup n=12577, mean=-0.4972 vs comparator mean=-0.3928; signed effect=-0.1043 (p=4.27e-183).

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_DHX9 in growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= q75 vs all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: High-growth DHX9 dependency contrast: subgroup n=12577, mean=-0.3614 vs comparator mean=-0.3243; signed effect=-0.0371 (p=1.50e-24).

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_TMED10 in growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= q75 vs all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: High-growth TMED10 dependency contrast: subgroup n=12577, mean=-0.2816 vs comparator mean=-0.2447; signed effect=-0.0369 (p=2.22e-24).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with braf_v600e = 1 have more negative dependency_BRAF scores than cell lines with braf_v600e = 0.
Among cell lines with braf_v600e = 1, skin lineage cell lines have more negative dependency_BRAF scores than non-skin braf_v600e = 1 cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_BRAF in braf_v600e = 1 vs braf_v600e = 0.
analyses.result_summary: BRAF V600E dependency_BRAF contrast: subgroup n=5574, mean=-0.8047 vs comparator mean=-0.2495; signed effect=-0.5552 (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Welch contrast restricted to braf_v600e = 1: skin lineage vs all other lineages.
analyses.result_summary: Skin-lineage contrast within BRAF V600E lines: subgroup n=1966, mean=-0.8114 vs comparator mean=-0.8011; signed effect=-0.0103 (p=0.295).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with egfr_amplification = 1 have more negative dependency_EGFR scores than cell lines with egfr_amplification = 0.
Brain lineage cell lines have more negative dependency_EGFR scores than non-brain lineage cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_EGFR in egfr_amplification = 1 vs egfr_amplification = 0.
analyses.result_summary: EGFR amplification dependency_EGFR contrast: subgroup n=3880, mean=-0.601 vs comparator mean=-0.2524; signed effect=-0.3486 (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_EGFR in lineage = brain vs all other lineages.
analyses.result_summary: Brain-lineage dependency_EGFR contrast: subgroup n=3565, mean=-0.3307 vs comparator mean=-0.2755; signed effect=-0.0552 (p=8.41e-17).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with erbb2_amplification = 1 have more negative dependency_ERBB2 scores than cell lines with erbb2_amplification = 0.
Breast lineage cell lines have more negative dependency_ERBB2 scores than non-breast lineage cell lines.
Luminal lineage_subtype cell lines have more negative dependency_ERBB2 scores than non-luminal cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_ERBB2 in erbb2_amplification = 1 vs erbb2_amplification = 0.
analyses.result_summary: ERBB2 amplification dependency_ERBB2 contrast: subgroup n=4890, mean=-0.6856 vs comparator mean=-0.2535; signed effect=-0.4321 (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_ERBB2 in lineage = breast vs all other lineages.
analyses.result_summary: Breast-lineage dependency_ERBB2 contrast: subgroup n=7007, mean=-0.3208 vs comparator mean=-0.2916; signed effect=-0.0292 (p=6.37e-9).

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_ERBB2 in lineage_subtype = luminal vs all other subtypes.
analyses.result_summary: Luminal-subtype dependency_ERBB2 contrast: subgroup n=3898, mean=-0.3234 vs comparator mean=-0.2934; signed effect=-0.03 (p=5.29e-6).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with kras_mutation = 1 have more negative dependency_KRAS scores than cell lines with kras_mutation = 0.
Pancreatic lineage cell lines have more negative dependency_KRAS scores than non-pancreatic lineage cell lines.
Colorectal lineage cell lines have more negative dependency_KRAS scores than non-colorectal lineage cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_KRAS in kras_mutation = 1 vs kras_mutation = 0.
analyses.result_summary: KRAS mutation dependency_KRAS contrast: subgroup n=11842, mean=-0.5594 vs comparator mean=-0.252; signed effect=-0.3075 (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_KRAS in lineage = pancreatic vs all other lineages.
analyses.result_summary: Pancreatic-lineage dependency_KRAS contrast: subgroup n=5102, mean=-0.426 vs comparator mean=-0.3133; signed effect=-0.1127 (p=2.67e-89).

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_KRAS in lineage = colorectal vs all other lineages.
analyses.result_summary: Colorectal-lineage dependency_KRAS contrast: subgroup n=5816, mean=-0.3689 vs comparator mean=-0.319; signed effect=-0.05 (p=5.90e-21).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with nf1_loss = 1 have more negative dependency_RIT1 scores than cell lines with nf1_loss = 0.

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_RIT1 in nf1_loss = 1 vs nf1_loss = 0.
analyses.result_summary: NF1-loss dependency_RIT1 contrast: subgroup n=4560, mean=-0.3527 vs comparator mean=-0.2572; signed effect=-0.0955 (p=2.03e-70).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Colorectal lineage cell lines have more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than non-colorectal lineage cell lines.
Cell lines with apc_mutation = 1 have more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than cell lines with apc_mutation = 0.
Cell lines with wnt_activity_score >= 0.819 have more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than all other cell lines.
The complete subgroup lineage = colorectal, apc_mutation = 1, and wnt_activity_score >= 0.819 has more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than all other cell lines.
Within colorectal lineage cell lines, the subgroup with apc_mutation = 1 and wnt_activity_score >= 0.819 has more negative dependency_KIF18A scores than other colorectal lineage cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_KIF18A in lineage = colorectal vs all other lineages.
analyses.result_summary: Colorectal dependency_KIF18A contrast: subgroup n=5816, mean=-0.7204 vs comparator mean=-0.2524; signed effect=-0.468 (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_KIF18A in apc_mutation = 1 vs apc_mutation = 0.
analyses.result_summary: APC-mutant dependency_KIF18A contrast: subgroup n=9285, mean=-0.5447 vs comparator mean=-0.2526; signed effect=-0.2921 (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_KIF18A in wnt_activity_score >= q75 vs all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: High-WNT dependency_KIF18A contrast: subgroup n=12508, mean=-0.4694 vs comparator mean=-0.2526; signed effect=-0.2168 (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_KIF18A in lineage = colorectal AND apc_mutation = 1 AND wnt_activity_score >= q75 vs all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: Complete colorectal/APC/high-WNT dependency_KIF18A subgroup: subgroup n=3133, mean=-1.1119 vs comparator mean=-0.253; signed effect=-0.8589 (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Welch contrast restricted to colorectal lineage: apc_mutation = 1 AND wnt_activity_score >= q75 vs other colorectal rows.
analyses.result_summary: Within-colorectal APC/high-WNT dependency_KIF18A subgroup: subgroup n=3133, mean=-1.1119 vs comparator mean=-0.2632; signed effect=-0.8487 (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with myc_amplification = 1 and copy_number_8q24 >= 0.428 have more negative dependency_RPL11 scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines with myc_amplification = 1 have more negative dependency_RPL11 scores than cell lines with myc_amplification = 0.

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_RPL11 in myc_amplification = 1 AND copy_number_8q24 >= q75 vs all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: MYC-amplified/high-8q24 dependency_RPL11 subgroup: subgroup n=7797, mean=-0.3647 vs comparator mean=-0.2524; signed effect=-0.1123 (p=3.53e-148).

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_RPL11 in myc_amplification = 1 vs myc_amplification = 0.
analyses.result_summary: MYC-amplified dependency_RPL11 contrast: subgroup n=8055, mean=-0.3614 vs comparator mean=-0.2523; signed effect=-0.1091 (p=7.04e-144).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964 and rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= 5.669 have more negative dependency_DHX9 scores than all other cell lines.
Cell lines with rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= 5.669 have more negative dependency_DHX9 scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_DHX9 in growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= q75 AND rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= q75 vs all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: High-growth/high-MYC dependency_DHX9 subgroup: subgroup n=3320, mean=-0.3892 vs comparator mean=-0.3297; signed effect=-0.0595 (p=1.44e-21).

analyses.code: Welch contrast: dependency_DHX9 in rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= q75 vs all other rows.
analyses.result_summary: High-MYC dependency_DHX9 contrast: subgroup n=12501, mean=-0.3551 vs comparator mean=-0.3265; signed effect=-0.0286 (p=2.00e-15).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a systematic dependency-heterogeneity screen, braf_v600e = 1 is the best-supported subgroup definition for more negative dependency_BRAF scores.
In a systematic dependency-heterogeneity screen, egfr_amplification = 1 is the best-supported subgroup definition for more negative dependency_EGFR scores.
In a systematic dependency-heterogeneity screen, erbb2_amplification = 1 is the best-supported subgroup definition for more negative dependency_ERBB2 scores.
In a systematic dependency-heterogeneity screen, kras_mutation = 1 is the best-supported subgroup definition for more negative dependency_KRAS scores.
In a systematic dependency-heterogeneity screen, nf1_loss = 1 is the best-supported subgroup definition for more negative dependency_RIT1 scores.

In a systematic dependency-heterogeneity screen, lineage = colorectal, apc_mutation = 1, and wnt_activity_score >= 0.819 is the best-supported subgroup definition for more negative dependency_KIF18A scores.
In a systematic dependency-heterogeneity screen, growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964 is the best-supported subgroup definition for more negative dependency_TMED10 scores, with only a weak effect.
In a systematic dependency-heterogeneity screen, growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964 and rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= 5.669 is a supported subgroup for more negative dependency_DHX9 scores.
In a systematic dependency-heterogeneity screen, growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= 0.964 is the best-supported subgroup definition for more negative dependency_POLR2A scores.
In a systematic dependency-heterogeneity screen, myc_amplification = 1 and copy_number_8q24 >= 0.428 is a supported subgroup for more negative dependency_RPL11 scores.

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 88 single predicates plus top pair/triple combinations; best interpretable subgroup was braf_v600e = 1.
analyses.result_summary: Final screen result for dependency_BRAF: subgroup n=5574, mean=-0.8047 vs comparator mean=-0.2495; signed effect=-0.5552 (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 88 single predicates plus top pair/triple combinations; best interpretable subgroup was egfr_amplification = 1.
analyses.result_summary: Final screen result for dependency_EGFR: subgroup n=3880, mean=-0.601 vs comparator mean=-0.2524; signed effect=-0.3486 (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 88 single predicates plus top pair/triple combinations; best interpretable subgroup was erbb2_amplification = 1.
analyses.result_summary: Final screen result for dependency_ERBB2: subgroup n=4890, mean=-0.6856 vs comparator mean=-0.2535; signed effect=-0.4321 (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 88 single predicates plus top pair/triple combinations; best interpretable subgroup was kras_mutation = 1.
analyses.result_summary: Final screen result for dependency_KRAS: subgroup n=11842, mean=-0.5594 vs comparator mean=-0.252; signed effect=-0.3075 (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 88 single predicates plus top pair/triple combinations; best interpretable subgroup was nf1_loss = 1.
analyses.result_summary: Final screen result for dependency_RIT1: subgroup n=4560, mean=-0.3527 vs comparator mean=-0.2572; signed effect=-0.0955 (p=2.03e-70).

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 88 single predicates plus top pair/triple combinations; best subgroup was lineage = colorectal AND apc_mutation = 1 AND wnt_activity_score >= q75.
analyses.result_summary: Final screen result for dependency_KIF18A: subgroup n=3133, mean=-1.1119 vs comparator mean=-0.253; signed effect=-0.8589 (p<1e-300).

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 88 single predicates plus top pair/triple combinations; strongest interpretable signal was growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= q75.
analyses.result_summary: Final screen result for dependency_TMED10: subgroup n=12577, mean=-0.2816 vs comparator mean=-0.2447; signed effect=-0.0369 (p=2.22e-24).

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 88 single predicates plus top pair/triple combinations; supported subgroup was growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= q75 AND rnaseq_MYC_log2_tpm >= q75.
analyses.result_summary: Final screen result for dependency_DHX9: subgroup n=3320, mean=-0.3892 vs comparator mean=-0.3297; signed effect=-0.0595 (p=1.44e-21).

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 88 single predicates plus top pair/triple combinations; best interpretable subgroup was growth_rate_doublings_per_day >= q75.
analyses.result_summary: Final screen result for dependency_POLR2A: subgroup n=12577, mean=-0.4972 vs comparator mean=-0.3928; signed effect=-0.1043 (p=4.27e-183).

analyses.code: Systematic screen over 88 single predicates plus top pair/triple combinations; supported subgroup was myc_amplification = 1 AND copy_number_8q24 >= q75.
analyses.result_summary: Final screen result for dependency_RPL11: subgroup n=7797, mean=-0.3647 vs comparator mean=-0.2524; signed effect=-0.1123 (p=3.53e-148).
